data.content: Shipment review approved. Both commits (cf7eb28d7cb7, 5a5c32fd7f3d) verified on main. CI green (runs 22997168629, 22997168706). make sanity passes with 95.31% coverage, no regressions. Implementation adds colored progress feedback to push/pull/sync commands via new progress module, with proper JSON-mode suppression and test coverage across 10 files (+417 lines).
